item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Aromatic vegetable patties GREEN DISH: Delicious vegetarian pattiespacked with herbs and vegetables. Served with a light potato salad, pickled redonions, freshly chopped chives, and grilled cabbage (2, 6).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Fajita-roasted mushrooms and cabbage – Crispy mushrooms andcabbage roasted with fajita spices, served on soft flatbread (whole grain ifpreferred). Topped with creamy feta-garlic dressing, and accompanied by avocadocrema and freshly chopped parsley on the side (1, 2, 11, 13, 15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Aloo palak – Soft potatoes in a spiced spinach sauce, a classic NorthIndian and Pakistani dish with a balance of heat and fresh flavors. Served withcool raita and fresh mint (15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Panang Curry with Tofu – A rich and aromatic Thai curry with soft tofu,red curry paste, creamy coconut milk, lemongrass, and kaffir lime leaves.Served with fragrant jasmine rice and plenty of fresh vegetables (4, 7, 13,15).

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Korean BBQ soy protein – Succulent soy protein marinated insweet and spicy BBQ sauce, served in a soft Bao bun. Accompanied byquick-fermented cabbage, sticky sauce, and crispy fried glass noodles (1, 3, 7,8, 13, 15).
